room.caption: [G3-6F] Luckily there's no wind. Guess Zephyr had a good day when making this.

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sCVDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=136 newMapY=240 toRoom=rBelmont3_6A

x+=8;y+=8 sprite_index=sCV_DeathParts image_index=2 image_speed=0 soundToPlay=global.snd_HeartPiece stringToShow="You found [Death's Eye]." fadingTime=70 boxSize=1
gameProgCheck=string_char_at(global.gameGate3Prog,2) if gameProgCheck="3" or gameProgCheck="4" instance_destroy()
image_yscale=2 type=0 enemySpawn=oCV_SalemWitch xSpawn=1168 ySpawn=704 activate=1
